flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Quincy College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $8.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Quincy College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $8.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Quincy College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Quincy College rose 47% between 2006 and 2009 (45.0% → 66.3%).
